title: Chapter 429
content:
Chapter 429: SheтАЩs Still The Scariest (2)

It was a table made of metal.

It wasnтАЩt a legendary-grade metal like Orichalcum or Mithril, but iron was still iron.

At the minimum, the raw material should be around heroic-grade or higher in terms of quality. It could certainly be used to create weapons. It was absurd to have made a table with this kind of material, but as I had seen the strength that crushed it barehanded, feelings of disconcerting and fear were intersecting.

тАШOh, thatтАЩs right. SheтАЩs that kind of person.тАЩ

Many people could easily cut metal or transform its shape using magic, but I could confirm that there were fewer than five people who could do it using simple force, even if I searched for them in the entire continent.

I couldnтАЩt even sense any magic being generated. It meant that she had achieved such a feat purely with her fingers.

I looked at the scene with a disconcerted face for a moment, and upon being called by her familiar voice, I couldnтАЩt be helped but be wary of her.

тАЬWhat are you doing? Come quickly. ItтАЩs time to go home. Huh?тАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬWhat are you doing, honey?тАЭ

тАЬNothing, nothing. IтАЩm coming.тАЭ

There were no major changes in her expression. However, her subtly distorted face seemed to elaborate how bad Cha Hee-raтАЩs mood was.

The reason she didnтАЩt explode was that she knew how embarrassing it wouldтАЩve been to get mad at something like that. Someone in her position should be able to cope with Jung HayanтАЩs childlike provocation.

If I thought about it, I had never seen Cha Hee-ra getting genuinely angry.

At best, she only gave out warnings when people, including Jung Hayan, bared their fangs at her.

In the end, she let those situations smoothly slip with a smile. After that, there would never be any topics raised about the incident.

She was forgiving and didnтАЩt fret over the little details. She was the greatest human.

тАШThat probably means sheтАЩs holding a grudgeтАжтАЩ

If she felt dissatisfied, she shouldтАЩve just said it out loud, and if she got upset, she shouldтАЩve just expressed it right away.

It wasnтАЩt only me. Everyone else considered Cha Hee-ra to be such a person.

It suddenly started to amplify my anxiety to find out that she had something hidden inside.

Whether she knew of it or not, Jung Hayan was passing by the side of the redhead proudly with her victorious smile.

My back trembled, thinking that the angered beast might suddenly raise her hand to smash the insane wizardтАЩs head. Truly, it was a catastrophe.

What was even scarier was that that might not be the worst ending.

тАШI have to take care of this right away.тАЩ

She must be trying to deceive the others through her transparent guile, but it was only proper for me to take care of it.

After, I started to worry about Cha Hee-ra, even as I said goodbye to Lee KiyoungтАЩs personal corps, including Oscar, Marlin, and Catherine.

When Cho Hyejin climbed onto the griffon and gestured for me to climb behind her, I carefully chose my next words.

тАЬI will ride with Cha Heera.тАЭ

тАЬYes, Vice Guild Master.тАЭ

It would be nice if she were a little disappointed, but Cho Hyejin started to nod with a bright face.

Rather, it was Jung Hayan who looked as if she was about to cry.

She looked at me with anxiety in her eyes as if she was telling me to think over my choice and that it wasnтАЩt right, but I had no choice.

I had to drink the beverage the way it was brewed. This balance of power had to be maintained.

As soon as it tipped to one side, my bodyтАЩs balance might also collapse.

It had to be perfectly balanced between right and left.

тАЬThen, Master, I will visit Lindel immediately for the museum case.тАЭ

тАЬDo that, Yuno.тАЭ

тАЬI shall.тАЭ

After having a conversation away from prying ears, I sent Yuno Kasugano to Celia immediately.

Of course, I immediately moved towards the red-haired gal.

Her face was somewhat cold as she looked at me. She seemed to want to hit me, at least even once.

Of course, such an accident should not happen. If such a moment occurred, my head would burst open like tofu.

тАЬWhat? Why should you go with the second option, huh?тАЭ

тАЬNo, itтАЩs just. I have something to tell youтАжтАЭ

тАЬTell me what?тАЭ

тАЬWell, rather than having something specific to say, itтАЩs just that I canтАЩt remember the last time I spent time with you. I donтАЩt think it would be troublesome to enjoy a conversation on the griffonтАж SoтАжтАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬGet on.тАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

Naturally, I became even more careful. This situation was indeed dangerous.

Although I was worried about Jung HayanтАЩs future moves, it was only important to douse the place where the flames were burning first.

Just after the griffon carrying Jung Hayan, our Elf Princess, and Cho Hyejin soared into the sky, the griffon that we were riding began to slowly rise.

I smiled at the fan club whilst waving passionately from below, but it didnтАЩt take long for the smile to disappear from my face.

тАШOkay. ItтАЩs time to take care of this one too.тАЩ

Cha Hee-ra was Cha Hee-ra, and the Red Mercenaries are the Red Mercenaries.

She was still in the middle of the power structure and had a significant position within Lindel.

Even if I had become a bigger figure, she was not someone I could handle as I pleased.

Thinking about her loyalty to me since I first came in, I couldnтАЩt just abandon her coldly.

No, if I tried to leave her in the first place, there was a strong possibility that my head would fall first.

Honestly, I couldnтАЩt even imagine that Cha Hee-ra would react in this way.

тАШShe has an unexpectedly cute side.тАЩ

When I thought about her usual self, it was strange to see her moping around. Of course, I had to put such thoughts aside for the moment.

I had to think about how to lighten her up first.

тАШWhat do I do?тАЩ

тАШThink, Light Kiyoung.тАЩ

тАШDonтАЩt think about your pride.тАЩ

I recalled what Jung Hayan did when I showed that attitude. I had found the answer.

I wasnтАЩt sure if it would work. No, I wasnтАЩt sure if I could do it, but I just had to man up and do it with thick skin.

тАЬYou know I like you a lot, right?тАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬAnd IтАЩm grateful tooтАж Honestly, itтАЩs thanks to you that I came this far. You believed in me a lot when we first met.тАЭ

Aegyo.

Somehow, it felt like I had become the girlfriend trying to cheer up her boyfriend, but it seemed that that method was effective when employed on Cha Hee-ra.

That was because what she wanted wasnтАЩt someone to lead her.

If she had been hoping for that in the first place, she wouldnтАЩt have approached me. My voice was full of cuteness, which tickled her gently.

I rubbed my head on her back and moved my hand, holding her waist tightly around her stomach, locking my fingers, and gently stimulated her.

It didnтАЩt suit me, but I did my best to be flirtatious in hopes of stimulating her senses.

If she were Cho Hyejin, she would have pushed me out of the griffon. Instead, her body kept flinching as if it had gotten affected by my unique characteristic.

тАШWhoa. I bet I can even work at a host bar. IтАЩm the best.тАЩ

Perhaps I did have a little talent. Somehow, she had begun to play along.

Was this how Diao Chan felt when he played with Lu Bu and Dong Zhou? Was this how Yang Guifei and Cleopatra felt when they played with the world?

It was disgusting even for me to do cosplay as if I had become such a guy, but her reaction was good, so I inevitably got excited.

тАШThe sex symbol, Lee Kiyoung!тАЩ

I was disgusted with myself.

тАЬDonтАЩt be mad, Hee-ra.тАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬIt was inevitable. And it was a simple gift I gave to cheer up Hayan because she was going through something difficult. You know that I like you a lot, right?тАЭ

тАЬтАжтАЭ

тАЬI like your red lips and red hair. I like your confidence. YouтАЩre not really angry, right? IтАЩm the one whoтАЩs exaggerating, right?тАЭ

тАШWhy is she so quiet? Is she really that angry?тАЩ

тАЬYou know I canтАЩt help it. I, of course, think that you are the first, butтАжтАЭ

тАШIs she really mad?тАЩ

I could only see her back, so I didnтАЩt know how she was reacting.

However, even after a long time, she was still in the same position, so my special move didnтАЩt seem to work. In the end, I had no choice but to put my hand in the bag that Hyunsung bought.

тАШDo I have a good ring?тАЩ

I had put various bribes in my bag in case Jung Hayan exploded, but I couldnтАЩt get anything worth using.

As soon as I leaned in out of anxiety, I found a red ring with the same symbol as her that began to stand out.

After taking out her ring, I gently patted one of her arms.

She didnтАЩt look back yet. But watching how she gently flipped one of her arms over to me, she didnтАЩt seem to hate that kind of touch.

Of course, what I did from there on out was what truly mattered.

I felt like she couldnтАЩt even imagine that I would put a ring on her.

I could see her body flinching a bit as if she felt the cold metal sliding down her finger. After putting it on her, she slowly pulled her arm back and looked at her hand, emitting some form of unknown excitement.

тАШItтАЩs time to deliver the final blow.тАЩ

I embraced her warmly.

тАЬCha Hee-ra, I love you. I really love you.тАЭ

I muttered words that were only half true.

Something unexpected happened right after that.

тАЬHuh?тАЭ

The griffon, which was flying properly, suddenly deviated from the path.

The advance team, that was going first, didnтАЩt notice it, but the griffon that had deviated from the route was falling at full speed.

тАШWhat. What is this?тАЩ

I was nervous about whether or not I touched a nerve. However, I didnтАЩt feel any hostility.

тАЬH-Hee-ra?тАЭ

She didnтАЩt answer. However, what I heard was the sound of breathing that continued to grow rougher.

тАШSon of aтАжтАЩ

If there were a Griffon Race, this was a performance that would catch a trophy.

The griffon, which came down to the ground swiftly, entered a place I wasnтАЩt aware of and started to fly continuously through a strange cave.

тАШWhere are weтАж?тАЩ

Perhaps we were in an abandoned dungeon.

IтАЩm not sure if Cha Hee-ra even knew where we were going. All I could do then was to hold onto her tightly and endure the wind resistance.

When the griffon finally arrived at our unknown destination, I opened my tightly closed eyes and took a look around.

тАЬWhere are we?тАЭ

It was so dark that I couldnтАЩt see anything.

тАЬLightтАжтАЭ

As I carefully made light, I saw a really small dungeon-like space.

However, what stood out more than that was a beast staring right at me with red eyes.

She glared at me with bloodshot eyes.

тАЬI didnтАЩt mean to do this. ButтАж you seduced me first.тАЭ

тАЬHuh?тАЭ

тАЬI said that you seduced me first.тАЭ

тАЬHuuh?тАЭ

I felt pressure comparable to encountering the Ancient God from the Crack Museum.

My body was stiff, and I couldnтАЩt move properly. All I could do was watch her slowly approach me.

I suddenly remembered Jin QingтАЩs last line.

тАШThere will come a time when the things youтАЩve done will eat you off.тАЩ

That bastard couldnтАЩt have meant what was currently happening.
